Calculation.Text: "View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

LayoutObject.name: TAG Portal

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gLevel ) Or FAT Title::Base project ≠ ""

StyledText.Data: Tags can be used to hide, lock or minify items when tag is not active. Create new tags by creating a List with Tag filter usage or use pre-defined tags.

CharacterStyle.Text: Create new tags by creating a List with Tag filter usage or use pre-defined tags.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "list_name" ; "New tag list" ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Tag" ) & SetProperty ( "list_template_id" ; "BAF6DADF-7209-4916-BD32-980F27F248EA" ) //Multiple choice

StyledText.Data: Number of tags: <<FAT Tag::Number of Tags found>>

LayoutObject.name: IO Portal

Calculation.Text: Case(IsEmpty(FAT Title::gObjectGroup) ; True; FAT List @ Tag::Object Group = FAT Title::gObjectGroup)
IsEmpty(FAT Tag::List id) Or PatternCount ( FAT Tag::List id ; "funkis" )
IsEmpty(FAT Tag::List id) Or PatternCount ( FAT Tag::List id ; "funkis" )

StyledText.Data: A Tag can be attached to a package, chapter, page, page item or list item. The tag decides if the item should be visible, hidden, locked or minified (collapsed) depending on the current user value. The user value can be set in a multiple choice question where the list of options is declared to be used as a "tag filter". The user value can also be set from Funkis Cloud, i.e member role.

Calculation.Text: Case(IsEmpty(FAT Title::gObjectGroup) ; True; FAT List::Object Group = FAT Title::gObjectGroup) And FAT List::Usage type = "Tag filter"
"This List is used " & FAT List::Number of List instances & " times in this Title."
"View all page items using this List"

StyledText.Data: View only Tags / Lists in group

Calculation.Text: "View all texts in the whole Title"
